editions.label: Compliance & Regulatory
editions.audience_description: Compliance officers and regulatory affairs teams tracking rules, enforcement actions, and filing deadlines
editions.analysis_instructions: Prioritise final rules, interim final rules, warning letters, enforcement actions, and consent decrees. Flag compliance deadlines, comment periods, and effective dates. Note which facility types, drug classes, or device categories are affected.

editions.label: Clinical Operations
editions.audience_description: Clinical, quality, and medical-affairs teams tracking drug/device approvals, clinical guidance, and patient-safety signals
editions.analysis_instructions: Surface FDA approvals, clearances, and denials; safety communications; clinical trial regulations; and guidance on labeling, manufacturing, or clinical practice. Flag patient-safety recalls and drug shortages.

editions.label: Reimbursement & Coverage
editions.audience_description: Finance, revenue cycle, and market-access teams tracking CMS payment policy and coverage decisions
editions.analysis_instructions: Focus on CMS final and proposed payment rules (IPPS, OPPS, PFS, ESRD, home health), coverage determinations, prior-authorization rules, and Medicaid policy. Quantify dollar impact per-episode or per-beneficiary where the source provides it.

deep_analysis.instruction: Produce a concise but substantive briefing for a healthcare compliance, clinical, and reimbursement audience. Stay grounded in the item; flag uncertainty rather than speculating.

sections.label: Background
sections.instruction: Two to three sentences situating this development: the rule, program, or enforcement thread it belongs to and what preceded it.

sections.label: Key stakeholders
sections.instruction: The agencies, provider types, manufacturers, payers, or patient populations with a material interest. Name them only if supported by the item.

sections.label: Scenarios to watch
sections.instruction: Two or three plausible ways this could develop over the next 6–18 months, each phrased as a short conditional.

sections.label: Recommended actions
sections.instruction: Concrete next steps a compliance, clinical-operations, or market-access team should consider this week.
